flavorPhrases: Wedged behind a collapsed lintel, wrapped in rotting cloth -- {container}.
Under a flagstone that sits proud of the others. The mortar was chipped away on purpose.
Inside a hollow column, accessible through a crack at knee height.
Buried in rubble at the base of a standing wall. Someone stacked the stones deliberately.
In a niche behind a crumbled fresco. The painting is gone but the hiding place survived.
Beneath a fallen roof beam, protected by the angle of the collapse.

sword: A {name} in a rotted leather scabbard. Decades of dust cling to the guard, but the blade itself is strangely unblemished.
A {name} wound in ancient cobweb. The wrapping has crumbled but the steel beneath shows no sign of age.
A {name} wrapped in oilcloth that has dried to a crust. The crossguard is clean underneath.
axe: A {name} coated in fine grey grit. The haft is dry and pale but the head is spotless beneath the dust.
A {name}. Cobweb fills every joint, but once wiped, the edge is as keen as the day it was stored.
dagger: A {name} in a sheath so old the leather crumbles. The blade inside has not aged a day.
A {name} wrapped in oilcloth that falls apart at the fold. The steel is clean and bright.
bludgeon: A {name} thick with stone dust. The grip wrapping has dried and split, but the head is unblemished.
A {name}. The shaft is pale and dry, but the striking face is smooth — not a pit, not a scratch.
polearm: A {name} with cobweb strung along the haft. The shaft has dried but the head still holds a keen edge.
A {name} caked in old dust. The rivets are bright underneath, as if recently set.
ranged: A {name} wrapped in mouldering canvas. The cloth falls away and the stave beneath is smooth and straight, the string still taut.
A {name} under a film of dust. The limbs flex without protest, as though it was strung yesterday.
heavy_armor: A {name} webbed in cobweb. Dust an inch thick in the joints, but beneath the grime the plates are mirror-bright.
A {name}. The padding has gone stiff with age, but the steel itself shows no corrosion at all.
light_armor: A {name} wrapped in cloth that has gone to tatters. The leather beneath is supple — impossibly so for something stored this long.
A {name}. The outer surface is dusty and stiff, but it flexes easily once handled. No cracking.
shield: A {name} with a thick coat of dust on the face. The straps are dry and cracked, but the boss beneath is bright and true.
A {name}. Cobwebs bridge the grip. The rim shows no damage despite everything around it crumbling.
cloak: A {name} that smells of old stone and damp. The wrapping has disintegrated, but the fabric itself is clean and whole.
A {name} folded in musty sacking. It shakes out without a single moth hole.
boots: A pair of {name} wrapped in sacking that falls apart. The leather is soft and supple — not at all what you would expect.
A pair of {name} with dust packed into the tread but the uppers unmarked.
ring: A ring under a thick patina. The tarnish wipes away too easily, revealing bright metal beneath.
A ring gone dark with age. It is heavier than it looks, and the metal is warm.
potion: A glass vial cushioned in rotted cloth. The wax seal is white with age but unbroken. The liquid inside has not settled.
A stoppered flask that should have cracked decades ago. It hasn't.
scroll: A scroll tube with a wax-sealed cap gone white with age. The seal is unbroken.
A leather scroll case gone stiff and dry. The parchment inside is crisp and the ink is vivid.
generic: A {name} under a thick layer of dust. Wipe it clean and it looks as though it was made this year.
A {name} wrapped in cloth that is falling apart at the folds. The item inside is pristine.
A {name}. Everything around it has aged. It hasn't.
